Contact

I am always happy to hear from fellow researchers, students, or anyone interested in astrophysics. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.

  • Email sayan.panda@iiap.res.in
  • GitHub github.com/sayanpanda
  • Scholar Google Scholar profile
  • LinkedIn LinkedIn profile

Mailing Address

18th Main Link Road,
Indian Institute of Astrophysics
2nd Block, Koramangala
Bangalore 560034, India
